title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button appears but nothing happens when clicked.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 12. The app was working fine until last week.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number. They've tried resending multiple times.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled and cannot be changed.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one in the system.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the refund yet. Payment was deducted but no refund initiated.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets 'Upload Failed' error. The image format is JPG under 2MB.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though payment was successful from their bank.

title: API Integration Failure
description: Third-party API integration is failing with timeout errors. Customer's application cannot fetch data from our endpoints.

title: Slow Dashboard Performance
description: Dashboard takes more than 30 seconds to load. Customer reports this started happening after the latest update.
